response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video content as a 3D concert performance by Inugami Korone at her 7th anniversary live event. 2. Observed a title screen from 00:00 to 03:34. 3. Identified the performance segment from 03:34 to 05:05. 4. Noted the song title 'Grateful Days' and credits '作詞・作曲：ACO / ZEEBRA / 谷内研' on-screen. 5. Performed a search for the lyrics using 'Grateful Days ACO ZEEBRA lyrics' to ensure accuracy. 6. Verified the lyrics and structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: This video is from the 'LAZY DOG NIGHT! INUGAMI KORONE 7th ANNIVERSARY LIVE' event. It begins with a title screen and then features a 3D stage performance of the song 'Grateful Days' by VTuber Inugami Korone, accompanied by two other performers.

scenes.description: Title screen for the 'LAZY DOG NIGHT! INUGAMI KORONE 7th ANNIVERSARY LIVE' event with background music.
Inugami Korone and two other performers sing and dance to 'Grateful Days'.
